name: Touhou Danmaku Maze
short_description: Arcade Mazeplay collides with the Touhou Project universe in this comical game! Can you help the famous ice fairy Cirno survive the angry residents of Gensokyo?
detailed_description:
Touhou Danmaku Maze is an Arcade-like Mazeplay game in the Touhou Project Universe!

But don't let the cute hand-drawn art deceive you! This game breaks the rules of traditional games mixing genres from Bullet Hell, Puzzle Routing, Arcade Action, and more!

Do you think you can help the famous ice fairy Cirno on her quest to make some money in the world of Gensokyo?

🌀 Four Difficulty Levels – Whether you're casual or a danmaku master, there's difficulty levels for all skill levels from Easy, Normal, Hard, and the dreaded Lunatic mode.

🔥 A True Touhou Experience – At launch, you'll dive into two levels, each featuring an intense boss battle. With a planned total of six levels, we're making the ultimate Touhou experience!

🎵 Dynamic Boss Music – Feel the intensity rise with multiple music tracks per level, dynamically shifting with each boss phase to heighten the excitement of battle.

📖 Visual Novel-Style Storytelling – Immerse yourself in Gensokyo’s latest adventure with beautifully illustrated cutscenes before and after each level, bringing the story to life in classic Touhou fashion!

Join Cirno and her loyal friend Daiyousei in an icy-cool business venture inspired by the Touhou Project series! Determined to become Gensokyo’s top snowcone tycoon, Cirno sets up shop to serve frosty treats to the locals. But as expected, things don’t go quite as planned! From mischievous customers to unexpected magical mayhem, chaos unfolds at every turn.

Can you help navigate the ups and downs of running a business and sell the snowcones she put so much love into making!? A charming and whimsical adventure awaits this adorable ice fairy!

Touhou Danmaku Maze redefines the maze genre by thinking outside the labyrinth—literally! Instead of hazards confined within the walls, the danger comes from beyond, unleashing a relentless barrage of danmaku (bullet hell patterns) that force you to weave, dodge, and strategize your way to victory.

This game puts a heavy emphasis on high-speed, precision-based gameplay with a strong speedrunning focus. Master the art of routing, experiment with different paths, and find the most efficient way to clear each stage in record time. Every second counts—can you outmaneuver the chaos and claim the best time?
